channel.title: Vivo Mobile Communication Co., Ltd. — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Vivo Mobile Communication Co., Ltd. (vivo).

item.title: CVE-2025-15515 · 6.9 MEDIUM
item.description: The authentication mechanism for a specific feature in the EasyShare module contains a vulnerability. If specific conditions are met on a local network, it can cause data leakage

item.title: CVE-2025-15567 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: Insufficient protection mechanisms in the Health Module may lead to partial information disclosure.

item.title: CVE-2025-15509 · 7.1 HIGH 🌩️
item.description: The SmartRemote module has insufficient restrictions on loading URLs, which may lead to some information leakage.

item.title: CVE-2025-5719 · 5.1 MEDIUM
item.description: The wallet has an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows access to specific pages.

item.title: CVE-2024-46941 · 4.8 MEDIUM — SystemUI component protection settings vulnerability
item.description: SystemUI has an incorrect component protection setting, which allows access to specific information.

item.title: CVE-2024-13186 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — MinigameCenter information leakage vulnerability
item.description: The MinigameCenter module has insufficient restrictions on loading URLs, which may lead to some information leakage.

item.title: CVE-2024-13185 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — MinigameCenter module information leakage vulnerability
item.description: The MinigameCenter module has insufficient restrictions on loading URLs, which may lead to some information leakage.

item.title: CVE-2024-13173 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — Health information leakage vulnerability
item.description: The health module has insufficient restrictions on loading URLs, which may lead to some information leakage.

item.title: CVE-2021-26281 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Information disclosure vulnerability in Alarm clock module
item.description: Some parameters of the alarm clock module are improperly stored, leaking some sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2021-26280 · 7.9 HIGH — Permission bypass vulnerability in permission manager module
item.description: Locally installed application can bypass the permission check and perform system operations that require permission.

item.title: CVE-2021-26279 · 5.9 MEDIUM — Information disclosure vulnerability in Weather module
item.description: Some parameters of the weather module are improperly stored, leaking some sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2021-26278 · 6.3 MEDIUM — Sensitive information leakage vulnerability in wifi module
item.description: The wifi module exposes the interface and has improper permission control, leaking sensitive information about the device.

item.title: CVE-2020-12487 · 7 HIGH — Command Execution Vulnerability in ABE service
item.description: Due to the flaws in the verification of input parameters, the attacker can input carefully constructed commands to make the ABE service execute some commands with root privilege.

item.title: CVE-2020-12484 · 6.4 MEDIUM
item.description: When using special mode to connect to enterprise wifi, certain options are not properly configured and attackers can pretend to be enterprise wifi through a carefully constructed wifi with the same name, which can lead to man-in-the-middle attacks.

item.title: CVE-2024-46939 · 2.4 LOW — Game Extension Engine Path Traversal Vulnerability
item.description: The game extension engine of versions 1.2.7.0 and earlier exposes some components, and attackers can construct parameters to perform path traversal attacks, which can overwrite local specific files

item.title: CVE-2020-12492 · 1 LOW — Wifi information acquisition vulnerability in Framework Services
item.description: Improper handling of WiFi information by framework services can allow certain malicious applications to obtain sensitive information.

item.title: CVE-2020-12491 · 4.8 MEDIUM — Framework Information Disclosure Vulnerability
item.description: Improper control of framework service permissions with possibility of some sensitive device information leakage.

item.title: CVE-2021-26277 · 5.6 MEDIUM — Security Advisory | PendingIntent hijacking vulnerability in Framework Services
item.description: The framework service handles pendingIntent incorrectly, allowing a malicious application with certain privileges to perform privileged actions.

item.title: CVE-2020-12488 · 5.5 MEDIUM — Broken Access Control Vulnerability in Jovi Smart Scene
item.description: The attacker can access the sensitive information stored within the jovi Smart Scene module by entering carefully constructed commands without requesting permission.

item.title: CVE-2020-12483 · 8.2 HIGH 🌩️ — AppStore Remote Download and Installation Vulnerability
item.description: The appstore before 8.12.0.0 exposes some of its components, and the attacker can cause remote download and install apps through carefully constructed parameters.

item.title: CVE-2020-12485 · 5.5 MEDIUM
item.description: The frame touch module does not make validity judgments on parameter lengths when processing specific parameters,which caused out of the boundary when memory access.The vulnerability eventually leads to a local DOS on the device.
